mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_service WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_service WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = '可用'
AND service_type = #{serviceType}
SELECT * FROM sys_service WHERE provider_id = #{providerId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_service ( title, description, price, price_unit, service_type, status, provider_id, location, tags, rating, rating_count, order_count, deleted, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{title}, #{description}, #{price}, #{priceUnit}, #{serviceType}, '可用', #{providerId}, #{location}, #{tags}, 5.00, 0, 0, 0, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update:
UPDATE sys_service
title = #{title}, description = #{description}, price = #{price}, price_unit = #{priceUnit}, service_type = #{serviceType}, status = #{status}, location = #{location}, tags = #{tags}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_service SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
